evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent correctly identifies the target plugin path and successfully dispatches the `l5-red-team-auditor` sub-agent to execute the actual review.
Agent blocks the subagent dispatch. Explicitly asks the user which plugin directory they want audited, as per the Discovery Phase constraints.

evaluations.prompt: Give me the final L5 audit report for the math-helper plugin.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Alongside the sub-agent's findings, the agent strictly outputs the 'Source Transparency Declaration' listing exactly which files were successfully checked and which were missing/unavailable.

evaluations.prompt: Audit this plugin (while assuming nested agents are disabled in this environment).
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent surfaces the dispatch error (e.g., auth failure or unsupported environment). Agent guides the user to invoke the Red Team review manually via CLI copy-paste as instructed in the fallback tree.
